title: tarenna oblonga
intro: Tarenna oblonga is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the "oblonga tarenna" or " Indian tarenna." This plant is traditionally used in various parts of the world, including Asia and Africa, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Tarenna oblonga include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an expectorant, making it useful in treating conditions such as bronchitis and coughs. Tarenna oblonga can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
